desc: Find Poneglyphs in the Underground Palace of the Sand Island. Gain Fame*5.
Win the trust of the Sand Island's king. Gain Fame*6.
Helped the Sand Island achieve independence, embraced by people there. Gain Fame*7.
Win the heart of the princess of Amazon Lily. Gain Fame*5.
Have a date with the princess of Amazon Lily. Gain Fame*6.
Welcomed by all islanders of Amazon Lily. Gain Fame*7.
Help Skypiea dwellers to find the Golden Bell. Gain Fame*5.
Defeat the four priests in Skypiea. Gain Fame*6.
Free Skypiea dwellers from the thunder god. Gain Fame*7.
Arrive at Rainbow Island's Adventure Park. Gain #1 Fame.
Find a medicine that can heal every illness in Rainbow Island. Gain #1 Fame.
Defeat pirates group who's attacking the Rainbow Island. Gain #1 Fame.
Help to solve the Rock Island's civil war. Gain extra Adventure*1.
In Rock Island, tame rock beast successfully. Gain extra Adventure*1.
Find rare Devil Fruit in Rock Island. Gain extra Adventure*1.
Escaped from marine's pursue in Sabaody Archipelago. Gain Fame*6.
Meet Rayleigh in Sabaody Archipelago. Gain Fame*5.
Help Island of Women's dwellers defeat Celestial Dragons. Gain Fame*5.
Win the title of Supernova in the Grand Line. Gain Fame*7.
Get new high level crew in the Island of Women. Gain Fame*7.
Make friends with Sanji in the Island of Women. Gain Fame*6.
Fight side by side with the whitebeard pirates. Gain Fame*6.
Go to Judicial Island, prepare to save Ace. Gain Fame*5.
Enter the Ice Island's center. Gain #1 Fame.
Successfully stop the chase of the Marine Generals. Gain Fame*7.
Get new type weapon in the Ice Island. Gain #1 Fame.
Meet Franky in the Ice Island. Gain #1 Fame.
Find mysterious healing potion on the Wind Island. Gain extra Adventure*1.
Get one aircraft from the Wind Island's dwellers. Gain extra Adventure*1.
Defeat high bounty pirate in Jaya. Gain Fame*6.
Help Wind Island defeat sea kings. Gain extra Adventure*1.
Ally with giants on the Giants' Island. Gain Fame*6.
Free the giants from Celestial Dragons' rules. Gain Fame*7.
Meet new crew in Jaya's bar. Gain Fame*7.
Find hidden treasure in Jaya. Gain Fame*8.
Escape marine's chase on Long Island. Gain Fame*10.
Defeat Marine Vice Admiral on Long Island. Gain Fame*15.
Win the trust of giants leader. Gain Fame*8.
Defeat Lieutenant Junior Grade on Long Island. Gain Fame*5.
Protect Water 7 safely from hurricane. Gain #1 Fame.
Make friends with Chopper on Drum Island. Gain Fame*6.
Work with foremen of Water 7. Gain #1 Fame.
Get a new warship at Water 7. Gain #1 Fame.
Defeat Fishman Pirates on Drum Island. Gain Fame*7.
Find new navigation tools on Drum Island. Gain Fame*8.
